subject: Remove catch throwable and error
commit_message:
Remove catch throwable and error

Fix the following sonar blocker issue:
 - Catch Exception instead of Throwable
 - Catch Exception instead of Error

Also,
 - removed duplicated code in the about modified files
 - fixed netowork-inventory-client-provider build failure due to
   missing PowerMockito dependency issue

Issue-Id: APPC-175
Change-Id: I807bf3b5577f8748932504d564824f228b01fbca
Signed-off-by: beili.zhou <beili.zhou@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/appc-master-verify-java/356/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/appc-master-verify-java/356

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Beili, each change review should have at most one subject. Please separate this into multiple commits with a single subject of each. This is a large change in lines that has 4 different changes from commit message, which makes it difficult to review and difficult to understand and revert later if an issue arises. 
 Do "One commit per change."
"Don't mix two unrelated functional changes. Idea is to divide to conquer. Think about the reviewer who must desiccate with issues he faces. Think about how easy it will be in case you have to revert code."

See: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Commit+Messages#CommitMessages-Do

Patch Set 1:

Abandon this review, as its contents are broken into individual review as per comments from Marcus.
